data.title: BUIDL, tokenized by Securitize, is now verified onchain by Chronicle Proof of Asset
data.description: In ZUG, Switzerland, it is announced that the BUIDL fund, tokenized by Securitize and supported by short-term U.S. Treasuries, repurchase agreements, and cash, has been verified by Chronicle Proof of Asset. The BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) fund, with $2.1 billion in assets under management (AUM), signifies a significant step in the institutional growth of tokenized money market products. This move showcases the transition from tokenized funds to data-rich financial instruments.

data.title: Reply Recognized as a Microsoft Frontier Partner for Enterprise AI Delivery
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] has been designated as a Microsoft Frontier Partner in the Microsoft AI Cloud Partner Program. This recognition comes in the form of earning the Frontier Partner Badge, which signifies their proficiency in providing AI-focused solutions across Cloud & AI Platforms, AI Business Solutions, and Security. The Frontier Partner badge is reserved for partners who exhibit advanced AI capabilities and satisfy stringent badge criteria at the moment of acknowledgment.
Banxico Cuts Key Rate By 25bps To 6.75% Vs Expectations Rates Unchanged, Vote 3-2

data.title: The Small Changes Revolution: Novotel Launches Star-Studded Collective to Make Longevity Accessible to All
data.description: Olympic gold medalist Kauli Vaast, plant-based advocate Alfie Steiner, soccer icon Javier Pastore, and sleep specialist Olivia Arezzolo are at the helm of the Novotel 37 Collective, demonstrating the power of making 1% daily enhancements that can lead to transformative outcomes. This initiative, based in Paris, is making waves by showing that consistent small improvements can yield significant changes. The collective showcases a diverse group of individuals from various fields who believe in the impact of gradual progress. Their message is resonating in a world where an overwhelming 68% of individuals are seeking ways to enhance their daily lives.

data.title: Enterprise Design Requires More Than Digitization to Prevent Fragmented Services, Advises Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: Many organizations are speeding up their digital transformation efforts, but a significant number are encountering challenges with fragmented and disconnected services. Recent findings from Info-Tech Research Group reveal that a common issue is the digitization of isolated processes without comprehensive end-to-end design. This approach restricts usability and hinders the overall effectiveness of digital initiatives.

data.title: Oasis Aesthetics & Wellness Introduces Breakthrough Noninvasive Technologies for Brain Health, Facial Rejuvenation, and Body Sculpting
data.description: In Sugar Land, Texas, on March 26, 2026, Oasis Aesthetics & Wellness unveiled its cutting-edge services that encompass mental health, facial rejuvenation, body sculpting, and injury recovery within a single facility. This innovative health and aesthetics center has gained recognition for its comprehensive approach.
BANXICO CONSIDERS ONE ADDITIONAL RATE CUT, TIMING UNSPECIFIED

data.title: AcreConnect® Integrates with EAVision Drones
data.description: A software platform called AcreConnect® developed in the U.S. has introduced a new integration with EAVision Drones. This allows spray drone operators to automatically sync flight data. The connection was announced in Solon, Iowa on March 26, 2026. This advancement is significant as it streamlines operations and enhances efficiency for operators.

data.title: The Remodeler's Moment: How Contractors Can Turn Market Shifts Into Profitable Growth
data.description: In today's construction industry, remodelers and roofing contractors can achieve lasting growth by adopting connected workflows. According to Kevin Geiger, SVP of Partnerships at Leap, embracing this approach is crucial for converting demand into sustainable expansion. Current data indicates a strong demand for services in this sector, with the majority of contractors reporting full schedules. This trend suggests that contractors who implement efficient workflows are well-positioned to capitalize on the high demand for their services.
NETFLIX: TO REVISE PRICES IN THE US, STARTING AT $8.99

data.title: Helix Earth Secures $12 Million in Oversubscribed Seed 2 Funding to Revolutionize Energy Efficiency and Humidity Management in Commercial HVAC Systems
data.description: In Houston, Helix Earth has successfully closed its Seed 2 funding round with a total raised amount of $12 million, surpassing the initial target due to high demand. The company specializes in transforming the HVAC industry through innovative technology originally developed by NASA.
IAEA: GROSSI REAFFIRMS GRAVE CONCERN OVER RECENT MILITARY STRIKES REPORTEDLY TAKING PLACE NEAR IRAN'S BUSHEHR NPP, MOST RECENT ON TUESDAY EVENING

data.title: Alamos Gold Provides Notice of Completion of Annual Filings
data.description: Alamos Gold Inc. released its annual information form and 2025 annual report on Form 40-F, along with audited financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2025. The documents were filed with the SEC on EDGAR and Canadian securities authorities on SEDAR+. They can be accessed at www.alamosgold.com and shareholders can request a free hard copy. Alamos Gold is listed on the TSX:AGI and NYSE:AGI.
IAEA: DG GROSSI CAUTIONS DAMAGE TO IRAN'S BUSHEHR NUCLEAR POWER PLANT COULD LEAD TO A MAJOR RADIOLOGICAL INCIDENT IMPACTING A VAST AREA IN IRAN & BEYOND

data.title: Nomad Temporary Housing Named "Temporary Housing Partner of the Year" by Bristol Global Mobility for the Second Year in a Row
data.description: Nomad Temporary Housing, a leading global corporate temporary housing provider, was recently awarded by Bristol Global Mobility for their outstanding partnership, shared values, and top-notch client service. The award was presented in San Diego on March 26, 2026. This recognition highlights Nomad Temporary Housing's commitment to excellence in the industry.

data.title: Massumi + Consoli Opens Orange County Office to Support Rapid Growth and Client Demand
data.description: A renowned nationwide law firm, Massumi + Consoli, known for its top-tier private equity and M&A services, revealed the establishment of a new office in Orange County, California. This move marks a significant expansion for the firm, coinciding with its ongoing growth phase.

data.title: Pyrotecnico Elevates MLB Opening Night with Stunning Pyro Drone Display at Oracle Park
data.description: On March 26, 2026, in San Francisco, Pyrotecnico, the top professional fireworks display provider in the country, and a key player in drone light shows and special effects, assisted with Major League Baseball Opening Night in the city. They introduced an innovative aerial display to the event.

data.title: Meta Stock Meltdown Pushes RSI Into Buy The Blood Territory
data.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) is currently experiencing a significant downturn, with its 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) dropping to 26.38, well below the typical level associated with capitulation. The stock is trading at around $551.99 on Thursday, a decline of over 25% from its 52-week high of $796.25. This steep drawdown has wiped out months of AI-driven optimism in just a few weeks, leading to a 16% decrease in the past month. Despite the rapid decline, analysts still see long-term potential in Meta, with a consensus price target of $853.65, suggesting a potential 55% upside if the stock returns to the Street's base case valuation. The contrast between the current market conditions and the optimistic long-term outlook highlights the uncertainty surrounding Meta's future trajectory.

data.title: The Inner Circle acknowledges Pamela A. Pappas, MD, FAPA as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member
data.description: Pamela A. Pappas, MD, FAPA, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, was recently recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Lifetime Member for her significant impact on Physician Mental Health and Wellbeing. Dr. Pappas is a renowned figure in the field and is highly esteemed for her contributions.
